extortion.description: QSi has been providing consulting services for over 20 years. QSi has worked with a select group of clients who possess an ardent desire for growth and realize that the recruitment of key talent is critical. Our experience and specialization translates into a clearer understanding of client needs and a shortened recruitment cycle.With Quikcard, businesses can have a benefits plan that's flexible and offers dental, medical, vision, and group travel insurance. Quikcard has been supporting Canadian businesses for over 30 years.
